blended.narrative: Fernie Alpine Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 33 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
